generated_from: GitHub PR scan by kernel family plus prior PR notes; all filtered CUDA optimization PRs are kept for source/runtime/tuning relevance.
paper_alignment: Production PRs are first-class evidence, with human summaries and machine metadata preserving traceability to PRs, changed code paths, tests, benchmarks, docs, and contest artifacts.

gemm_quant.title: GEMM / Quantization
gemm_quant.recipe: Inspect scale layout, accumulator type, tile/schedule choice, epilogue fusion, and partial-tile guards before deriving a candidate.
gemm_quant.ncu_hint: Tensor pipe %, DRAM/L2 bytes, active cycles, register pressure, and scale-load traffic.

attention_kv.title: Attention / KV / Decode
attention_kv.recipe: Preserve page/KV/layout and plan-run contracts; profile memory traffic separately from math utilization.
attention_kv.ncu_hint: Long scoreboard, L2/DRAM traffic, global-load sectors, tensor pipe %, and shared-memory bank conflicts.

moe_routing.title: MoE / Routing
moe_routing.recipe: Separate routing, permutation, top-k, and expert GEMM costs; keep tail-token and expert-layout tests attached to the idea.
moe_routing.ncu_hint: Tensor pipe %, SM imbalance, branch divergence, L2 traffic, permutation traffic, and synchronization stalls.

norm_elementwise.title: Norm / Elementwise / Epilogue
norm_elementwise.recipe: Look for fusion, vectorization, dtype conversion, and store-traffic reductions before changing math.
norm_elementwise.ncu_hint: DRAM %, L2 bytes, global load/store sectors, eligible warps, and long scoreboard.

memory_primitives.title: Memory / Primitives
memory_primitives.recipe: Transfer primitive policy carefully: coalescing, shared-memory staging, partial tiles, and determinism are part of the contract.
memory_primitives.ncu_hint: DRAM throughput, L2 hit rate, memory sectors, shared-memory conflicts, and synchronization overhead.

scheduler_autotune.title: Scheduler / Autotune
scheduler_autotune.recipe: Treat scheduler/autotune configs as shape-specific evidence; replay benchmark shapes before generalizing.
scheduler_autotune.ncu_hint: SM occupancy, waves/SM, active cycles, tail effects, and load imbalance.

arch_pipeline.title: Architecture / Pipeline
arch_pipeline.recipe: Extract the architecture assumption first: SM target, TMA/WGMMA/tcgen path, cluster use, and pipeline stages.
arch_pipeline.ncu_hint: Tensor pipe %, memory pipe utilization, barrier stalls, wait groups, and occupancy.

compiler_runtime.title: Compiler / Runtime
compiler_runtime.recipe: Treat compiler/runtime integration as part of the kernel: launch wrapper, cache/JIT behavior, generated code, and build flags need tests.
compiler_runtime.ncu_hint: Generated kernel shape, launch overhead, occupancy, register pressure, and compile-time-selected schedule.

benchmark_test.title: Benchmark / Test Evidence
benchmark_test.recipe: Mine shape sets, tolerance rules, warmup logic, and profile commands before mutating code.
benchmark_test.ncu_hint: Use the PR's benchmark/profile command as the first replay target.

kernel_other.title: Other Kernel Cases
kernel_other.recipe: Use the PR as grounded prior art; inspect diff, linked tests, and benchmark evidence before applying the idea.
kernel_other.ncu_hint: Choose metrics based on the changed kernel family after opening the diff.
